command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup && git pull origin main
echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/phase9e1_gen.py
python3 /tmp/phase9e1_gen.py

git add .
git status --short | head -20
git commit -m "Phase 9E.1 Agent Identity Runtime — specification and architecture"

git tag Phase9E1-AgentIdentityRuntimeSpec

git push origin main && git push origin Phase9E1-AgentIdentityRuntimeSpec
git push github main && git push github Phase9E1-AgentIdentityRuntimeSpec

echo "=== VERIFY ==="
ls docs/agent-identity-*.md
git log --oneline -4
git tag -l | tail -6
